english: USSR ACADEMY OF SCIENCES, INSTITUTE OF ORIENTAL STUDIES. Y. N. ROERICH. TIBETAN-RUSSIAN-ENGLISH DICTIONARY with Sanskrit parallels. ISSUE 10. Edited by Y. Parfionovich, V. Dylykova. NAUKA PUBLISHERS, CENTRAL DEPARTMENT OF ORIENTAL LITERATURE, MOSCOW 1987
